items.title: Port pro feature/pr/pr.merged commands to OpenCode
items.description: Translate /pro:feature, /pro:pr, and /pro:pr.merged from Claude Code command semantics to OpenCode command semantics, preserving workflow behavior and documenting every concession.

items.title: Plan ccplugins command port continuation
items.description: Resume the Claude Code plugin command porting effort by cataloging which commands already exist in OpenCode and which remain outstanding so the next batch can be selected.

items.title: Align install-handoff symlink remediation guidance
items.description: Update the Makefile install-handoff target so that when the symlink points to an unexpected target it emits the same explicit recovery hint as install-colon (e.g., suggest running make uninstall) before exiting with an error, matching coderabbit review feedback.

items.title: Add make help target
items.description: Add a GNU-style "make help" target that prints a concise usage summary of the supported install/uninstall/status commands so users can discover them quickly.

items.title: Unify command and plugin installs
items.description: Refactor the Makefile so `make install` runs both command and plugin installers, introduce `install-commands`/`install-plugins` plus matching uninstall targets, and update docs/help accordingly.

items.title: Add session handoff check command
items.description: Create a /pro command that writes or verifies .plan/session-handoff.md so users can confirm their session handoff snapshot is current before ending work.

items.title: Automate session handoff snapshots and install updates
items.description: Add per-session session-handoff snapshots with acknowledge/dismiss workflows, update installer automation to auto-discover commands, and retire slash namespace installs.

items.title: Add /make: commands for Makefile automation
items.description: Create root-level /make: commands (sibling to /pro:) for Makefile-related utilities: /make:convert (convert package.json scripts to Make targets), /make:setup (setup Make-based workflow), /make:help (add make help target where missing)

items.title: Add Plan-by-default safety rail
items.description: Add a global OpenCode plugin that automatically returns the active primary agent to Plan after any user prompt issued under Build, and provide an explicit Makefile target (make enable-plan-safety) that applies Plan-by-default + Build permission gating to the user's global OpenCode config with backups and dry-run support.

items.title: Deterministic primary agent switching for safety plugins
items.description: Replace the auto-return-to-plan plugin's reliance on `agent.cycle` with a deterministic set-by-name API/event once OpenCode exposes it (e.g., `tui.agent.set { name }` and/or a current-agent query), so the safety rail remains correct even with multiple custom primary agents.

items.title: Harden auto-return-to-plan against custom primary agent cycles
items.description: The current auto-return-to-plan plugin relies on `agent.cycle`, which is only deterministic for the default two-primary-agent setup (Build/Plan). Once upstream exposes deterministic agent switching (e.g. `tui.agent.set { name }`) and/or a current-agent API/event, update the plugin to switch to Plan by name so the safety rail remains correct even with multiple custom primary agents.

items.title: Ccplugins port unified roadmap (pro/author/clip + infra)
items.description:
Create a durable, backlog-driven roadmap and PRD/brief for porting the Claude Code marketplace package `SavvyAI/ccplugins` into OpenCode-native configuration. Scope includes: remaining `/pro:*` commands, `/author:*` commands, `/clip:*` content capture commands (as OpenCode commands, not skills), and non-command infrastructure parity (MCP config, hooks, templates/bin assets).

Key decisions for roadmap order:
- Port `/pro:spec*` before `/pro:backlog*`.
- Move `/pro:spike` early.
- Drop only build-in-public (legacy agent/skill); keep `/pro:social` and `/pro:og`.
- Drop `bip.*` entirely.
- Skip legacy `/pro:rules*` in favor of toolkit-native `/rules:*`.
- `/clip:content.screenshot` should copy an actual image to clipboard cross-platform when possible, with a clear fallback to copying a file path.

Canonical planning root: `doc/.plan/` (ADR-005).

This epic is the narrative anchor: the backlog + brief must let a new session resume without re-research.

items.title: Port /pro:spec and /pro:spec.import
items.description: Port `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/commands/spec.md` and `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/commands/spec.import.md` into `opencode/pro/commands/`, translating to OpenCode command conventions and ensuring all artifacts are written under `doc/.plan/` (ADR-005).

items.title: Port /pro:backlog* commands
items.description: Port `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/commands/backlog.md`, `backlog.add.md`, `backlog.resume.md`, and `backlog.mvp.md` into `opencode/pro/commands/`. Ensure canonical backlog path is `doc/.plan/backlog.json` (ADR-005) and update command text accordingly.

items.title: Port /pro:spike
items.description: Port `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/commands/spike.md` into `opencode/pro/commands/`, aligning planning artifacts to `doc/.plan/` and ensuring the command remains time-boxed and documentation-friendly.

items.title: Port /pro:onboarding
items.description: Port `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/commands/onboarding.md` into `opencode/pro/commands/`, but skip legacy `/pro:rules*` commands in favor of a toolkit-native `/rules:*` namespace. Update onboarding guidance to point to `/rules:*` workflows instead of relying on `CLAUDE.md` symlink installs.

items.title: Port /pro:audit* commands
items.description: Port `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/commands/audit.md`, `audit.quality.md`, `audit.repo.md`, and `audit.security.md` into `opencode/pro/commands/`. Ensure any backlog output targets `doc/.plan/backlog.json` and any templates referenced are relocated consistently.

items.title: Port /pro:quality-gate and /pro:dev.setup (plus templates/_bins strategy)
items.description: Port `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/commands/quality-gate.md` and `dev.setup.md` into `opencode/pro/commands/`. Decide and implement a stable home for legacy `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/commands/_templates/*` and `_bins/*` assets, then update command references.

items.title: Port branch/session ops commands
items.description: Port `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/commands/branch.park.md`, `branch.rmrf.md`, `handoff.md`, `git.main.md`, and `roadmap.md` into `opencode/pro/commands/`, aligning planning paths with `doc/.plan/` and ensuring safety prompts remain explicit.

items.title: Port /pro:product.validate and /pro:product.pitch
items.description: Port `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/commands/product.validate.md` and `product.pitch.md` into `opencode/pro/commands/`, keeping outputs compatible with `doc/.plan/product/` artifacts and existing `/pro:product.brief` flow.

items.title: Port remaining /pro:* long tail (excluding bip.*)
items.description: Port the remaining legacy pro commands into `opencode/pro/commands/` (including `social.md` and `og.md`, excluding `bip.md` and `bip.setup.md`). Ensure any template/bin dependencies are resolved via the standardized assets strategy.

items.title: Port /author:* commands
items.description: Port `_tmp_ccplugins/author/commands/*` into OpenCode commands so `/author:*` workflows are available under OpenCode. Ensure install automation can symlink the `author:*` namespace and that the book project structure is preserved.

items.title: Port /clip:* commands as OpenCode commands
items.description: Implement `/clip:*` as OpenCode commands (not skills) based on `_tmp_ccplugins/clip/skills/*` intent. `/clip:content.screenshot` must copy an actual image to clipboard cross-platform when possible, with fallback to copying a file path.

items.title: Port Pro MCP server config to OpenCode
items.description: Translate `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/.mcp.json` into OpenCode `opencode.json` MCP configuration (or an equivalent documented setup). Decide which servers are enabled by default versus documented as optional.

items.title: Port Pro hooks (checkpoint + error capture) to OpenCode plugin or de-scope
items.description: Claude Code hook declarations in `_tmp_ccplugins/pro/hooks/hooks.json` and scripts (`checkpoint.sh`, `error-capture.sh`) do not port 1:1 to OpenCode. Re-implement the behavior in an OpenCode plugin where feasible, or explicitly de-scope with documented trade-offs.

items.title: Add OpenCode-only /pro:copy.last.response
items.description: Add an OpenCode-only helper command similar to `/pro:copy.questions`, but instead copies the entire most recent assistant response to the clipboard to avoid manual scrolling/copying during planning and documentation work.

items.title: Add /rules:* toolkit commands
items.description: Add a toolkit-native `/rules:*` command namespace that helps place rules correctly (command vs plugin vs ADR vs docs), creates provenance-aware rule proposals via a planning conversation, and applies changes only when leaving plan mode via `/rules:apply`. This replaces the legacy `/pro:rules*` methodology.

items.title: Add opt-in install for toolkit AGENTS.md
items.description: Ship a minimal, constitutional `opencode/AGENTS.md` and add explicit Makefile targets (`make install-agents`, `make uninstall-agents`) to symlink it to `~/.config/opencode/AGENTS.md` without making it part of the default install.

items.title: Port /pro:backlog* + /pro:spec* + /pro:spike and branch resume helpers
items.description:
Port the remaining ccplugins work-selection and session-continuity commands into OpenCode, focusing on: `/pro:backlog`, `/pro:backlog.add`, `/pro:backlog.resume`, `/pro:backlog.mvp`, `/pro:spec`, `/pro:spec.import`, `/pro:spike`, and branch-related helpers used for resuming work (e.g. `/pro:branch.park`, `/pro:branch.rmrf`, `/pro:handoff`, `/pro:git.main`, `/pro:roadmap`).

Requirements:
- Canonical plan root is `doc/.plan/` (ADR-005); read legacy `.plan/` only as a fallback.
- `/pro:backlog.resume` should behave like a new session entrypoint: resume in-progress work, and when ambiguous, prompt the user while recommending the best default (tie-break using newest pending session-handoff snapshot when available).
- Avoid relying on bloated `AGENTS.md`/`CLAUDE.md` for workflow details; command text should be self-contained.

Deliverables:
- New command markdown files under `opencode/pro/commands/` for the above.
- Planning notes archived under `doc/.plan/.done/feat-port-pro-backlog-spec-spike/`.

items.title: Harden /pro:backlog* UX parity and validation
items.description:
Follow-up after porting `/pro:backlog*`:

- Improve selection UX beyond plain numbered prompts (where OpenCode supports it).
- Decide and document backlog status vocabulary (currently uses `open|in-progress|completed`; branch abort paths also mention `aborted`).
- Re-run `coderabbit --prompt-only` when rate limits/timeouts allow and address any additional findings.

items.title: Fix session handoff ledger references missing CLI
items.description:
Session handoff ledger/snapshots reference `node bin/session-handoff.mjs ...`, but that file is not present in typical client project repos. This makes the suggested next steps incorrect and causes confusing handoff commentary.

Fix: install the CLI globally under `~/.config/opencode/bin/session-handoff.mjs` and update ledger + docs to reference that path.

Repro/expected/actual: TBD (fill from user report).

items.title: ccplugins has new backlog items
items.description: ccplugins has been updated and has new items that need to get into the backlog.

items.title: Port /pro:evaluate.framework skill
items.description: ccplugins has a new /pro:evaluate.framework skill which needs to be ported. Prioritize this ahead of the remaining `/pro:audit*`, `/pro:quality-gate`, and other later ccplugins roadmap items so the new upstream workflow is evaluated early.
